k10_cleanup_observation_commit_ed046d5.commit_subject: chore: discard duplicate S10-D2 K10 diagnostic artifacts (Option 1)
k10_cleanup_observation_commit_ed046d5.from_this_sessions_perspective: Race-pattern outcome inverted vs P11: for K10, THIS session was the canonical winner (sealed first, at non-colliding paths); the parallel session's later run was the duplicate. The parallel session followed the same defer-and-document discipline this session used for P10 and is using for P11.

verdict_agreement_between_two_independen.agreement_strength: Two independent implementations producing the same K10 PASS verdict at ~0.04-0.05 avg vs the 0.50 threshold constitutes strong corroboration of gap G2 closure.
verdict_agreement_between_two_independen.delta_explanation: Both methodologies share derive_rth_daily_bars + simple daily returns + Pearson + unweighted mean of 6 pairs. ~0.0127 avg-delta is from inner-join vs return-computation ordering. Both clear K10 by ~10x the 0.50 threshold.

k10_cleanup_observation_commit_ed046d5.what_was_deleted: Only the parallel session's own competing K10 diagnostic artifacts at reports/external_research_hunter/s10_d2_..._k10_pairwise_dependence_diagnostic_report.{json,md}. These were unstaged and uncommitted at delete time; never published.
k10_cleanup_observation_commit_ed046d5.what_was_kept_canonical: This controller session's K10 work at commit 4ddaa84 (4 files: tools/external_research_hunter/s10_d2_k10_pairwise_dependence.py, tests/test_s10_d2_k10_pairwise_dependence.py, and reports/external_research_hunter/s10_d2_..._k10_pairwise_dependence_result_sealed.{json,md}). All 4 files remain tracked in HEAD and byte-stable.

operator_next_step_recommendations_docum.description: Treat parallel commit 23c7164 as the canonical S10-D2 terminal park record. Move forward to S11-D1 (single-instrument MNQ.c.0 long-history Databento candidate; Tier-N spec plan committed at parallel 488579e but build NOT pre-authorized). S11-D1 directly addresses the K9 sample-size constraint by using a single instrument over a longer history (rather than the 4-symbol 3-year OOS that constrained S10-D2). Operator authorization phrase for next-phase would be e.g. 'Authorize S11-D1 Tier-N spec DRAFT' (or whichever phase the S11-D1 plan names).

Treat the S10-D2 chain (Tier-N, plan-lock, phase-2, P3-P3.6 builds, P4 smoke, P6 IS, P6.5 cost-stress, K10, P7, P10, P11 park) as a unit of work. Pause new authorizations and review the chain end-to-end before opening S11-D1 or any other candidate. Useful if operator wants to reflect on lessons before launching another multi-week candidate lifecycle.

If operator wants additional S10-D2 evidence before declaring fully parked, authorize an OOS cost-stress sweep (S0/S2/S3/S4 against OOS cache). This would NOT close gap G1 differently (cost-stress already cleared at IS) and would NOT close the K9 sample-size gap (same 53 trades). Mostly informational; ~5 min wall time.
operator_next_step_recommendations_docum.notes: Tension with the just-sealed P11 park: re-running OOS-side cost-stress on a parked candidate is structurally valid (the cache is read-only; the driver is byte-stable) but signals continued interest in S10-D2 that may contradict the park decision. Operator's call.

point_1_p10_was_real_run.evidence: executive_park_decision explicitly references P10 with metrics (200 closed trades IS, 53 OOS, all safety counters zero, max DD improved vs IS); P10 commit 15231cb itself had run_completed_without_exception=True, duration_seconds=81.816, monkey_patches_applied_count=0, driver_byte_stable_through_run=True.
point_1_p10_was_real_run.operator_required: P10 OOS was a real run.

point_2_oos_directionally_consistent.evidence: oos_vs_is_comparison.what_survived enumerates: (a) direction of edge (positive sharpe/expectancy/net PnL), (b) all safety counters zero, (c) no-pyramid invariant held, (d) starting-cash invariant held; oos_vs_is_comparison.what_degraded enumerates the magnitude losses (expectancy ~0.44x, sharpe ~0.70x, net PnL/year ~0.39x of IS).
point_2_oos_directionally_consistent.operator_required: OOS metrics were positive and directionally consistent.

point_3_k9_a1_failed_53_lt_100.evidence: why_park_not_advance[0]: 'OOS closed-trade count (53) is below K9 threshold of 100. A1 acceptance gate FAILED.' Same metric also embedded in executive_park_decision.
point_3_k9_a1_failed_53_lt_100.operator_required: K9/A1 failed because closed trades were 53 < 100.

point_4_not_refutation_not_confirmation.evidence: executive_park_decision verbatim: 'neither a confirmation nor a refutation - it is an absence of refutation under a structurally small sample.' Reinforced by what_the_park_does_NOT_mean (9 anti-claims) and what_the_park_means (5 items).
point_4_not_refutation_not_confirmation.operator_required: This is not a refutation and not confirmation.

point_5_parked_under_insufficient_sample.evidence: park_status_enum = PARKED_SAFE_BUT_OOS_INDETERMINATE_K9_FIRED (semantically equivalent to INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE; parallel's enum is more specific about WHICH gate fired).

point_6_no_further_phases_under_this_can.evidence: what_the_park_means[4]: 'Any future continuation must come through a separate fresh sealed authorization.' what_the_park_does_NOT_mean[4]: explicitly names S11-D1, longer OOS, OOS cost-stress, and 'fresh candidate' as NOT pre-approved. why_park_not_advance[2]: 'a fresh sealed authorization with a documented research hypothesis' required for any P10.5 / P11.5 / similar.
point_6_no_further_phases_under_this_can.operator_required: No further S10-D2 phases are authorized under this candidate ID.

point_7_s11_d1_natural_next_dont_start.evidence: what_the_park_does_NOT_mean[4] names S11-D1 explicitly as NOT pre-approved. The memo's future_research_options_only_no_pre_approval block (all_options_require_separate_fresh_sealed_authorization = True, no_option_is_pre_approved_by_this_memo = True) defers all successor authorization. S11-D1's tier-N spec plan was authored separately at parallel commit 488579e but its build/execution is NOT pre-authorized.
point_7_s11_d1_natural_next_dont_start.operator_required: Natural next research direction is S11-D1 MNQ long-history, but do not start it in this step.

operator_required_seven_points_coverage_.summary_coverage_verdict: All 7 operator-required points are covered by the parallel P11 memo. No coverage gap requires this session to author a competing P11 record.

preemption_findings.parallel_p11_classification_note: Operator-requested park label was INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE; parallel memo uses the more specific closed-enum value PARKED_SAFE_BUT_OOS_INDETERMINATE_K9_FIRED. Semantically equivalent: both name K9 (closed_trades=53 < 100) as the load-bearing reason. Parallel's enum more precisely identifies the specific gate that fired.

purpose: Document, read-only, that the S10-D2 P11 PARK step authorized this turn was preempted by the parallel controller session, which authored a comprehensive sealed P11 memo at commit 23c7164 (reports/s10_d2_p11_park_memo_sealed.{json,md}, report_seal_sha256 e121b82b411697c7d06bbe9ee1cc2df29c04df76712873ed0fbfd76f25fab1cb). Audit confirms that memo covers all seven operator-required points adequately. This controller session defers to the parallel P11 memo as the canonical S10-D2 terminal record. This memo records the defer decision and the K10 cleanup outcome at a non-colliding path; it does NOT alter or supersede the parallel canonical P11.

race_condition_summary_full_session.pattern_observation: Three S10-D2 race patterns this session, all resolved with Option 1 (defer or discard the duplicate). When this session won (K10), the parallel session's duplicate was discarded. When the parallel session won (P10, P11), this session authored a non-colliding observation memo. Net result: zero competing canonical artifacts; complete audit trail of both perspectives via observation memos.
